message:
test(sparse): add comprehensive unit and property-based test coverage for sparse matrices

- Add proptest dev-dependency and serde_json for structured test logging
- Add SparseCase test infrastructure with configurable matrix generation
- Add unit tests for CSR/CSC deduplication, layout consistency, and bounds
- Add COO construction and format conversion round-trip identity tests
- Add SpMV correctness tests with identity, zero, and arbitrary matrices
- Add hardened-mode validation tests for unsorted index rejection
- Add scale/add/subtract operation tests with edge cases
- Add 5 proptest property-based tests (512 cases each):
  roundtrip CSR↔CSC, SpMV vs dense, nnz addition bounds,
  shape preservation, and sorted invariants
- Add structured JSON logging schema validation for test forensics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
